summary: Iteration 2 - Tested new Templates + Responses + Digital Signature module. Backend: 15/15 pytest pass (templates RBAC, seed presence, response CRUD, signing flow w/ SHA-256 hash, double-sign rejection, invalid image rejection, history events, role-based access). Frontend: full e2e Playwright pass - sidebar Plantillas link visible for all roles, TemplatesPage admin can create/delete (delete hidden for personal), DocumentDetail Respuestas tab works, template selector interpolates placeholders ({numero_entrada}, {remitente}, {asunto}, {usuario}, {departamento}, {fecha_actual}, {fecha_recepcion}), SignaturePad accepts canvas drawing, submission produces FIRMADA badge + signature image + visible SHA-256 hash, edit button disappears once signed, print button appears.

minor.issue: When a document is deleted, related responses are NOT cascaded (only comments + history are). Orphan response docs may remain in db.responses. Low priority since UI hides them, but recommended cleanup.

issues: Template selector uses a native HTML <select> instead of shadcn Select (matches pre-existing pattern on NewDocumentPage). Visual inconsistency only.

React hydration warning on console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' caused by emergent dev tooling injecting <span> wrappers inside <option> elements with template names. Non-blocking, but pollutes console. The ev-tooling injection happens because JSX renders `{t.name} · {label}` directly inside <option>; consider concatenating into a single string to suppress.

action_items: (Optional/Low) Cascade delete responses when a document is deleted in DELETE /api/documents/{id} - add `await db.responses.delete_many({"document_id": doc_id})`.
(Optional/Cosmetic) Concatenate template name into a single string for <option> children to silence console hydration warning, e.g. {`${t.name} · ${TPL_CAT_LABEL[t.category] || t.category}`}.
critical_code_review_comments: Signature image size limit (1.5MB) and data:image prefix check are correctly enforced.

Hash payload concatenates id|doc_id|subject|body|user_id|user_name|signed_at - tamper-evident; suggest also persisting the canonical payload string (or version field) for future integrity reverification.
_can_view_doc gives jefe_departamento access when doc has no department yet (doc.department is None) - intentional for un-routed inbox; documented behaviour.
server.py is now ~1090 lines - approaching split threshold; consider routers/templates.py and routers/responses.py.

PATCH /api/templates/{id} requires ALL fields (name, category, subject, body) because it reuses TemplateIn (no Optional). True PATCH semantics would allow partial updates - acceptable but worth noting.
test_credentials: Verified working: admin@gestion.com/admin123, recepcion@gestion.com/demo123, jefe.tecnico@gestion.com/demo123, personal2@gestion.com/demo123
seed_data_creation: Backend seed_templates inserts 5 default templates (acuse, requerimiento, resolucion, notificacion, informe) on startup if collection empty. Verified in tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new endpoints/templates/responses are fully covered in /app/backend/tests/test_templates_responses.py - reuse for regression. Use VALID_PNG constant for signature image fixtures. Frontend signature pad: use canvas.bounding_box() + page.mouse.move/down/up to draw strokes. Note that <option> elements get React hydration warnings from emergent dev tooling - ignore. The Respuestas tab testid is 'docdetail-tab-responses'. To set up a doc accessible to personal2 you must POST /assign-department (tecnico) AND /assign-person.
